claim_bullets.bullet_text: JavaScript expressions yield values like coffee orders (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.18-18)
Input expressions return output values in JavaScript (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.18-18)
The coffee shop model illustrates JavaScript evaluation (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.18-18)
JavaScript evaluates expressions to produce values (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.18-18)

source_record_text: The Prelude: Values and Expressions over Coffee chapter introduces foundational concepts using a coffee shop analogy to explain how JavaScript expressions evaluate to values.
